sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97441" key="*stw/ac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Στώαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">στοά</etym>) <sense id="n97441.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one of the Porch</tr_>, i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a Stoic</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1420.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Herm.Iamb.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
